metadata.title: Nav Link Header
metadata.description: Display navigation links at the top of the notes.

regex.source: Notice("Failed to read the daily note template")
regex.target: Notice("无法阅读每日笔记模板")

regex.source: .error(`Failed to read the daily note template '${l}'`,u)
text:`File "${this.fileTitle}" does not exist. Are you sure you want to create a new note?`
regex.target: text:`文件 "${this.fileTitle}" 不存在. 确定新建文件？`
.setName("在每个视图中显示导航链接")
.setName("在页面预览中显示导航链接")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display annotated backlinks in the navigation. If one of the annotation strings is placed immediately before a link, the link is recognized as an annotated link. Notes with annotated links appear as backlinks at the top of the destination note. ")
regex.target: .setDesc("在导航中显示带注释的反向链接。如果其中一个注释字符串放在链接之前，则该链接将被识别为带注释的链接。带有注释链接的注释在目标注释的顶部显示为反向链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Define the annotation strings. Any string, including emoji, is acceptable as long as the following link is recognized as a backlink. To specify multiple annotations, separate them with commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义注释字符串。任何字符串，包括表情符号，只要以下链接被识别为反向链接，都是可以接受的。要指定多个注释，请用逗号分隔它们。")
.setDesc("显示链接到相邻的每日笔记。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display a placeholder when there is nothing to display. This prevents the contents of the view from being rattled when the link is loaded.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当没有要显示的内容时显示占位符。这可以防止在加载链接时视图的内容出现抖动。")

regex.source: .setName("Allow a space between the annotation string and the link")
regex.target: .setName("允许在注释字符串和链接之间留出空格")

regex.source: .setDesc("Even if there is a space between the annotation string and the link, the link is still recognized as an annotated link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("即使注释字符串和链接之间有空格，链接仍会被识别为注释链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Define the property mappings. Each mapping consists of a property and an emoji. Each line should be in the format 'property:emoji'.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义属性映射。每个映射由一个属性和一个表情符号组成。每行的格式应为 “属性：表情符号”。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Filter out duplicate notes in the navigation.")
.setDesc("Use the property value as the display name for property links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用属性值作为属性链接的显示名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("The property name to display for property links. If left blank, the property name will not be displayed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于显示属性链接的属性名称。如果留空，则不显示属性名称。")
